description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered and rusted green exterior, featuring a wide white band around its middle. The white band is heavily stained and displays a yellow warning symbol with a black exclamation mark, indicating hazardous contents. The surface is mottled with patches of rust and grime, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure and age. The top of the barrel is flat and sealed, with two small circular bungs for filling or emptying, and dark stains are visible on the lid. The barrel has two prominent horizontal reinforcement ribs, one near the top and one near the bottom, providing structural strength. Its overall appearance suggests it is used for storing or transporting industrial liquids, possibly chemicals or waste, in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, rusted green metal barrel with a white hazard-marked band and reinforced ribs, showing heavy weathering and industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white band with a yellow hazard symbol, rust patches, and dark stains on the lid.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the white band without visible markings, extensive rust, and the flat, sealed top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displays the white band, mostly unmarked, with green and rusted surfaces.
description_view_3: Rear view highlights the weathered green and rusted exterior, with the white band and no visible markings.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: yellow hazard symbol with exclamation mark
